home.title: Ship faster with clean defaults.
home.description: Vite, React, TypeScript, REST API helpers, JWT auth, i18n, Redux Toolkit, TanStack Query, Biome, Tailwind, and Motion are ready out of the box.

todos.title: Todos
todos.description: Example feature module with REST service patterns and typed state.
todos.apiNote: Connect your backend at VITE_API_URL to enable live REST data.

animation.title: Lightweight UI animation
animation.description: Small Motion examples for smooth product interactions, onboarding, and marketing sections.

auth.jwtHint: Prefer server-set httpOnly cookies in production. Bearer tokens are supported when your API requires them.
